subcodes.first_line: O eloquent poet and fluent scribe! The purpose of poetry and composition is to express the inner mysteries and hidden secrets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب بلیغ و دبیر فصیح مقصد از شعر و انشاء بیان راز درون و اسرار مکنون و
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @poems and quotation from poetry, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @rational arguments
